name: callout-formatting
description: Example declarative extension that exposes Forge's safe callout Markdown transform without running arbitrary code.

permissions.reason: Reads selected Markdown text before wrapping it as a local callout.
Writes the callout-formatted Markdown back to the current note.

contributes.label: Wrap selection as callout
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported callout transform for selected Markdown.
